description: Nowledge Mem lifecycle hooks — Working Memory injection and session capture

hooks.command: command -v nmem >/dev/null 2>&1 || { command -v nmem.cmd >/dev/null 2>&1 && nmem(){ local q=''; for a in "$@"; do q="$q \"$a\""; done; cmd.exe /s /c "\"nmem.cmd\"$q"; }; }; nmem --json wm read 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import sys,json;d=json.load(sys.stdin);c=d.get('content','');print(c) if c else sys.exit(1)" 2>/dev/null || cat ~/ai-now/memory.md 2>/dev/null || true

command -v nmem >/dev/null 2>&1 || { command -v nmem.cmd >/dev/null 2>&1 && nmem(){ local q=''; for a in "$@"; do q="$q "$a""; done; cmd.exe /s /c ""nmem.cmd"$q"; }; }; { nmem --json wm read 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import sys,json;d=json.load(sys.stdin);c=d.get('content','');print(c) if c else sys.exit(1)" 2>/dev/null || cat ~/ai-now/memory.md 2>/dev/null || true; } && printf '
---
Context was compacted. If you discovered important insights, save them before continuing:
  nmem m add "<insight>" --title "<short title>" --importance 0.8
'

command -v nmem >/dev/null 2>&1 || { command -v nmem.cmd >/dev/null 2>&1 && nmem(){ local q=''; for a in "$@"; do q="$q \"$a\""; done; cmd.exe /s /c "\"nmem.cmd\"$q"; }; }; command -v nmem >/dev/null 2>&1 && printf '[Nowledge Mem] Search proactively when past knowledge would help: nmem --json m search "query". Save decisions and learnings autonomously: nmem m add "content" -t "Title" -i 0.8' || true

hooks.statusMessage: Saving Claude Code thread before compaction...
